languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Боль пронизывает тело{/d} Батошски и впервые он кричит. Дико, яростно, неистово. Его руки разжимаются, а из ран брызжет кровь.{/n}

{n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Боль пронизывает тело{/d} Батошски и впервые он кричит. Дико, яростно, неистово. Его руки разжимаются, а из ран брызжет кровь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}剧痛折磨{/d}着巴托什斯基的身体，他第一次惨叫出声。那声音狂乱、暴怒、歇斯底里。他松开双手，鲜血从伤口中喷涌而出。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}剧痛折磨{/d}着巴托什斯基的身体，他第一次惨叫出声。那声音狂乱、暴怒、歇斯底里。他松开双手，鲜血从伤口中喷涌而出。{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Batoshski'nin bedeni acıdan kıvranıyor{/d}, ilk defa çığlık atıyor. Vahşice, öfkeyle, çılgınca. Tutuşu gevşiyor, yaralarından kan fışkırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Batoshski'nin bedeni acıdan kıvranıyor{/d}, ilk defa çığlık atıyor. Vahşice, öfkeyle, çılgınca. Tutuşu gevşiyor, yaralarından kan fışkırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pris d'une douleur intense{/d}, Batoshski ne peut retenir son tout premier cri jusqu'alors. Un cri perçant, enragé, presque animal. Son étreinte se relâche, et le sang se met à inonder ses plaies.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pris d'une douleur intense{/d}, Batoshski ne peut retenir son tout premier cri jusqu'alors. Un cri perçant, enragé, presque animal. Son étreinte se relâche, et le sang se met à inonder ses plaies.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}dolor azota{/d} el cuerpo de Batoshski y, por primera vez, grita. Salvaje, furioso, desesperado. Su agarre se aligera y la sangre surge de sus heridas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}dolor azota{/d} el cuerpo de Batoshski y, por primera vez, grita. Salvaje, furioso, desesperado. Su agarre se aligera y la sangre surge de sus heridas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Der Schmerz brandet durch Batoshskis Körper{/d}, und zum ersten Mal schreit er. Wild, wütend, verzweifelt. Sein Griff lockert sich und Blut strömt aus seinen Wunden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Schmerz brandet durch Batoshskis Körper, und zum ersten Mal schreit er. Wild, wütend, verzweifelt. Sein Griff lockert sich und Blut strömt aus seinen Wunden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}激痛がバトシュスキーの体を襲い、初めて彼は叫んだ。狂おしく、激しく、必死の叫び声。彼の握りから血が流れ、傷口から血が噴き出す。{/d}{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}Pain wracks{/d} Batoshski's body and, for the first time, he screams. Wildly, furiously, frantically. His grip loosens, and blood gushes from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_KnowAboutIzhdrigWeakness}激痛がバトシュスキーの体を襲い、初めて彼は叫んだ。狂おしく、激しく、必死の叫び声。彼の握りから血が流れ、傷口から血が噴き出す。{/d}{/n}
